description: Steven Laver introduces the Solana Mobile stack and the Saga phone, discussing its features and upcoming events for developers interested in mobile applications on the Solana platform. He highlights the fee-free DAPP Store, Mobile Wallet Adapter, and Seed Vault technology integrated into the Saga phone.
topic_summary: Introduction to Saga and SMS, highlighting the features of the Solana Mobile stack, the Saga phone, and upcoming developer events [t=1:84 - t=267:22].
